faq.title: Frequently asked questions about CBAM Calculation Engine

item1.question: Does Arvenza guarantee CBAM declarations?
item1.answer: No. Arvenza does not guarantee compliance outcomes. The platform helps structure supplier data, calculations and evidence for CBAM preparation — your team remains responsible for declaration decisions.

item2.question: Can suppliers enter data directly?
item2.answer: Yes. Controlled supplier access, structured data requests and evidence upload are built into the intake workflow — reducing manual follow-up for compliance teams.

item3.question: Is calculation methodology traceable?
item3.answer: Yes. Methodology notes, assumptions and audit trail are structured within the calculation workflow to support internal review and validation.

item4.question: Can evidence files be shared with external stakeholders?
item4.answer: Yes. Outputs can be prepared for importers, internal teams or verifier briefing as structured evidence packs — not ad hoc document folders.

hero.title: EU Sustainability Regulatory Coverage
hero.description: Structured platform support for the regulations shaping EU trade, manufacturing, and supply chain compliance.

cbam.title: CBAM — Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism
cbam.description: The EU's carbon border adjustment mechanism requires importers to report embedded emissions and purchase CBAM certificates. Arvenza RegTech structures calculation, declaration, and verification workflows into audit-ready digital processes.

ppwr.title: PPWR — Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
ppwr.description: PPWR introduces comprehensive requirements for packaging design, recyclability, and extended producer responsibility. Arvenza RegTech manages packaging data, tracks compliance metrics, and supports reporting obligations.

eudr.title: EUDR — EU Deforestation Regulation
eudr.description: EUDR requires operators and traders to conduct due diligence to ensure commodities are deforestation-free. Arvenza RegTech provides geolocation, risk assessment, and traceability evidence management.

dpp.title: DPP / ESPR — Digital Product Passport
dpp.description: The Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation introduces Digital Product Passports requiring structured product lifecycle data. Arvenza RegTech enables passport creation, data management, and regulatory alignment.

supplier.title: Supplier Evidence Management
supplier.description: Cross-regulation supplier data collection and evidence management — ensuring traceable, validated documentation across your supply chain for audit readiness.

CBAM reporting cycles, supplier evidence requirements, packaging data preparation and traceability expectations are creating recurring workflows that cannot be managed reliably through disconnected spreadsheets and email threads.

Arvenza's roadmap expands from this shared operating model.

regulationsCbam.title: CBAM compliance requires supplier data and traceable calculation infrastructure
regulationsCbam.description: Arvenza RegTech supports CBAM preparation by managing product scope, supplier data, embedded emissions calculation, and evidence packs in a structured digital workflow.

requirements.title: What does CBAM require?
requirements.body: CBAM requires importers and operators to report embedded emissions for covered goods, supported by supplier data, calculation methodology, and auditable evidence. Preparation spans product scope, supplier engagement, and structured documentation.

supplierData.title: Why is supplier data critical?
supplierData.body: Embedded emissions calculations depend on accurate supplier-specific data. Without structured supplier data collection and evidence intake, calculations lack traceability and audit-ready documentation.

emissions.title: How should embedded emissions calculation be structured?
emissions.body: Calculations should follow a documented methodology with an audit trail linking inputs, assumptions, and outputs. A structured workflow ensures consistency across products, suppliers, and reporting periods.

evidence.title: Evidence packs and declaration preparation
evidence.body: CBAM preparation requires organizing supplier responses, calculation outputs, and supporting documentation into declaration-ready evidence packs that compliance teams can review and submit.

support.title: How does Arvenza support CBAM preparation?
support.body: CBAM Calculation Engine combines supplier data collection, embedded emissions calculation, methodology audit trail, and audit-ready documentation in one structured workflow — from supplier intake to declaration-ready evidence.
